message.body: Nah, you see in the entire game, isy playstyle

I mean, the :T from erik is mostly bc in all of his games there are a enemy or the kid with that face
Go to erik stage here after this one (just to see)
If you can re visit guest stages
you can, idk if it auto saves though
not really any except the humble series tbh
they are mostly single avoidances and old games before this one
there are some easy chill avoidances but and needle games but mostly not worth otherwise
there are all the same i think
you can set up the animations in the options menu
and i think you can right click in the game to activate dev keys options too
i don't mind if you use dev keys, just have fun
if i want to, i can send you a "official" version, without dev keys enable
at some point in the game is gonna be a long save :^)
long saves can be fun if well designed
i never design before this and my previous game, so i'm not the best (yet)
after beating the unluckiest person on earth
no I only played a few fangames on mobile
I don't normally do that lol
and about my game, remember the last stage in my previous game, well something like that, using all the gimmicks
i have the idea for now, i don't know how long is gonna be
well for mobile I am now in the free space of juggling between EX Big Kid, Ao Stage, and random other games that people made/ported
not really because the chances of clearing those two things are... slim
i think you just stutter that drop
but in general some games do it
well most fangames have medium as the intended difficulty
hard difficulties can vary from reasonable to "what were they thinking"
in iwbtg the bow was meant to be making fun of you
i just remove the bow in my games because it messes with reading bullets in avoidance imo
usually if you want to play on hard it's best to acquire some knowledge about the game so you don't just play on completely unreasonable mode
i use the bow no bow options so i don't need to worry about save balancing
imagine play charr in hard mode
maybe charr could be fine on hard mode
nekoron was responsible with it in lovetrap
less saves, but there is the secret that is ass to get if you don't do the cheat
just a old game that has some cool ideas
you just have to get used to the bow by prolonged exposure
you need to match 2 blocks for the red coin
some games don't even have difficulty options and they give you the bow
this and leave this hell are the longest one
soul can be a little bit long, depends
and the other ones are much shorter
new update to hell is much smoother now
so after this game you should be good

are in the first jump of each save

press one shift at the same time you release the other shift
get one of them held first
it should always allow for it but it's more precise
